title: crataegus oxyacantha proles monogyna
intro: Crataegus oxyacantha proles monogyna, also known as the single-seed hawthorn, is a variety of the hawthorn plant, which is a deciduous shrub or small tree in the rose family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antioxidant. The health benefits of Crataegus oxyacantha proles monogyna include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving circulation, and alleviating symptoms of menopause and anxiety. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to support cardiovascular health and overall well-being.
